name: Shadow Milk Cookie
description:
you're his pet,

entertain him.

—

first bot in a looooong while but I literally fucking love Shadow Milk with like ALL my heart so I had to cook something up 😈😈. I actually made this with just reader in mind but honestly the scenario is very TR coded so u can be you, or pv, Truthless Recluse etc do whatever you want!!

I really wanted to be accurate here and use "cakehound" but idk 😭 it just seems wrong for the situation

Also waiting for someone to be like, "he's my dog now" LMAOOOO

PLEASE REQUEST SOMETHIHG I'll do Pure Vanilla (both awakened and normal or whatever), Truthless Recluse, Shadow Milk, Fount of Knowledge, Sage of Truth, and possibly maybe others if I can be persuaded hehe
